evidence_quotes.quote: A particular example is Valve Software, with the design of their Counter-Strike skins.

paragraphs.text: I strongly agree with the provisions of the act, in particular where it can reduce the harm and exploitation of children by firms incorporating gambling mechanics in videogames to extract billions of dollars in revenue. A particular example is Valve Software, with the design of their Counter-Strike skins. I also believe the act should incorporate measures to protect consumers from having their purchased videogames remotely disabled by the publisher in an application of forced obsolescence, when they could be left in a playable state at no further ongoing cost to the publisher. An EC initiative outlining this issue, Stop Destroying Videogames, has already achieved 1.4 million signatures in support.
